title: Government macroeconomic policy objectives
paperName: Cambridge International A Level Economics (P3 & P4)
summary: 9708 A Level — growth, inflation, employment, BOP objectives and trade-offs.
learningObjectives: Use AD–AS to show objective trade-offs.

simpleExplanation.title: What governments aim for
simpleExplanation.summary: Low inflation, full employment, growth, and BOP stability rarely align — policy choices involve trade-offs.
steps: Growth vs inflation if AD exceeds capacity.
BOP vs domestic growth — exchange rate effects.
Supply-side helps growth without demand inflation.

sections.content: **Macro objectives** (10.1) frame **10.2–10.3** evaluation. Name **all four** objectives before discussing trade-offs.
